_comment: Cost-summary playbook query #3: tag-coverage roll-up, scoped in supported KQL.

parameters.query: Resources | where subscriptionId in~ ('77777777-7777-7777-7777-777777777777', '88888888-8888-8888-8888-888888888888') | extend owner = tostring(tags['owner']), environment = tostring(tags['environment']), cost_center = tostring(tags['cost-center']) | summarize total=count(), no_owner=countif(owner == ''), no_environment=countif(environment == ''), no_cost_center=countif(cost_center == '') by subscriptionId
